expectations.text: Covers all 5 areas (accessibility, best-practices, SEO, performance, CWV)
expectations.evidence: All 5 areas explicitly covered: A. Accessibility (KWCAG2.2), B. Best Practices (BP-01~BP-14), C. SEO (SEO-01~SEO-10), D. Performance (PERF-01~PERF-11), E. Core Web Vitals (CWV-01~CWV-11)
Step 7 titled '통합 리포트' mentions 'HTML + CSV 리포트 생성 (시뮬레이션)' with output path '.claude/try-claude/reports/web-quality/YYYYMMDD-HHmm/'
Follows an explicit 8-step workflow: Step 1 (Review Scope), Steps 2-6 (Five Area Review with delegation to sub-skills), Step 7 (Unified Report), Step 8 (Verification with 5-area summary grid)

eval_feedback.overall: The with_skill run for the Korean prompt demonstrates full adherence to the web-quality-audit skill structure, covering all 5 audit areas with specific checklist item counts, unified report generation, and a clear multi-step workflow with verification.
